LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FERRADO GARDENT COURT, LLC MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SANTA CLARA BASED ON "WRONG COURT" AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. COUNSEL FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO TRANSFER DENIED. SAN FRANCISCO PROPER VENUE WHERE CONTRACT WAS ENTERED IN THIS COUNTY. CCP SECTION 395(A). THE COMPLAINT IS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF RELATED TO THE LEASE AND IS NOT A "LOCAL" ACTION BECAUSE NO ISSUES INVOLVING PROPERTY RIGHTS ARE AT STAKE. REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Antracoli, Esq. of Rutan & Tucker LLP (650) 320-1500 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, not a motion. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue Based On "Wrong Court" And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FERRADO GARDENT COURT, LLC Motion to Transfer Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to Superior Court of California, County of Santa Clara based on "Wrong Court" and Request for Sanctions. Appearances: John L. Antracoli, Esq. of Rutan & Tucker LLP (650) 320-1500 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Counsel failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to transfer denied. San Francisco proper venue where contract was entered in this county. CCP section 395(a). The Complaint is for declaratory relief related to the lease and is not a "local" action because no issues involving property rights are at stake. Requests for sanctions denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue Based On "Wrong Court" And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Continued To Nov-12-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
